error_signature: Copied to clipboard successfully but nothing is copied
title: Clipboard functionality not working in Chrome over HTTP
symptom: When trying to copy workflow nodes in n8n, the message 'Copied to clipboard successfully' appears, but nothing is actually copied to the clipboard.
applies_when: Using n8n on a self-hosted server
Accessing n8n via HTTP in Google Chrome
not_this_if: Using a different browser like Firefox
root_cause: Google Chrome's clipboard API does not function over insecure origins (HTTP). This restriction prevents the clipboard from being accessed properly when n8n is served over HTTP.
fix_steps: Add your n8n URL to the list of insecure origins
Relaunch Chrome to apply the changes
agent_instruction: Modify Chrome's settings to allow clipboard access for your n8n URL and relaunch the browser.
